summary: CP at exactly 0.41 threshold; strict inequality means status quo = NO; CP stable at 0.41 for 5 days with occasional dips to 0.40
content:
Key findings for post 42182:
- Current CP: 0.41 (exactly at threshold)
- Threshold: strictly higher than 0.41
- Resolution: Feb 27 (~10 days)
- CP trajectory: was 0.35-0.36 for weeks, moved up to 0.41 around Feb 12, stable since
- 750 forecasters = large stable base
- Brief dips to 0.40 observed on Feb 13-14 and Feb 16
- No concrete new catalysts for upward movement
- Mixed news sentiment: IPO planned for late 2026 but profitability concerns
- Status quo = NO (0.41 exactly doesn't satisfy strictly higher)
